title: Explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
summary_full: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.
summary_public: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.

SY.label: negative
